editMovementModal.outWarning1: • Huu ni muamala wa punguzo - kurekebisha wingi kutaathiri orodha ya sasa
editMovementModal.outWarning2: • Ongeza wingi = punguza hesabu zaidi | Kupunguza wingi = kuongeza hesabu

editMovementModal.adjustmentWarning1: • Huu ni muamala wa marekebisho - kurekebisha wingi kutarekebisha orodha hadi thamani mpya
